name: Portcullis
flavor: Realms at War — the great iron gate. Reskin of the Switch. Activate at the end of a Move to raise or lower it.
summary: Flip the Portcullis token. While it is shut (dark side showing), sightlines through the gate are choked: for each shut Portcullis on the Field, ALL players have 1 fewer reroll when Attacking.

effects.text: While shut, every Attack on the Field has -1 reroll.
